title: rubus notabilis
intro: Rubus notabilis, also known as the Notable Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the eastern Himalayas and parts of China. Its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, thanks to its high content of antioxidants and fiber. The health benefits of Rubus notabilis include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-cancer agent due to its high levels of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Rubus notabilis is often made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
